CVE-2005-2611.name: Veritas Backup Exec Windows Remote File Access
CVE-2005-2611.description:
This module abuses a logic flaw in the Backup Exec Windows Agent to download
          arbitrary files from the system. This flaw was found by someone who wishes to
          remain anonymous and affects all known versions of the Backup Exec Windows Agent. The
          output file is in 'MTF' format, which can be extracted by the 'NTKBUp' program
          listed in the references section. To transfer an entire directory, specify a
          path that includes a trailing backslash.

CVE-2005-2611.name: Veritas Backup Exec (Windows) - Remote File Access (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2611.description: Veritas Backup Exec (Windows) - Remote File Access (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0771.name: Veritas Backup Exec Server Registry Access
CVE-2005-0771.description:
This modules exploits a remote registry access flaw in the BackupExec Windows
          Server RPC service. This vulnerability was discovered by Pedram Amini and is based
          on the NDR stub information posted to openrce.org.
          Please see the action list for the different attack modes.

CVE-2005-4797.name: Solaris LPD Arbitrary File Delete
CVE-2005-4797.description:
This module uses a vulnerability in the Solaris line printer
          daemon to delete arbitrary files on an affected system. This
          can be used to exploit the rpc.walld format string flaw, the
          missing krb5.conf authentication bypass, or simply delete
          system files. Tested on Solaris 2.6, 7, 8, 9, and 10.

CVE-2005-3589.name: FileZilla FTP Server Admin Interface Denial of Service
CVE-2005-3589.description:
This module triggers a Denial of Service condition in the FileZilla FTP
          Server Administration Interface in versions 0.9.4d and earlier.
          By sending a procession of excessively long USER commands to the FTP
          Server, the Administration Interface (FileZilla Server Interface.exe)
          when running, will overwrite the stack with our string and generate an
          exception. The FileZilla FTP Server itself will continue functioning.

CVE-2005-2120.name: Microsoft Plug and Play Service Registry Overflow
CVE-2005-2120.description:
This module triggers a stack buffer overflow in the Windows Plug
          and Play service. This vulnerability can be exploited on
          Windows 2000 without a valid user account. Since the PnP
          service runs inside the service.exe process, this module
          will result in a forced reboot on Windows 2000. Obtaining
          code execution is possible if user-controlled memory can
          be placed at 0x00000030, 0x0030005C, or 0x005C005C.

CVE-2005-2120.name: Microsoft Windows Plug-and-Play - 'Umpnpmgr.dll' Denial of Service (MS05-047) (1)
CVE-2005-2120.description: Microsoft Windows Plug-and-Play - 'Umpnpmgr.dll' Denial of Service (MS05-047) (1)

CVE-2005-2120.name: Microsoft Windows Plug-and-Play - 'Umpnpmgr.dll' Denial of Service (MS05-047) (2)
CVE-2005-2120.description: Microsoft Windows Plug-and-Play - 'Umpnpmgr.dll' Denial of Service (MS05-047) (2)

CVE-2005-3398.name: HTTP Options Detection
CVE-2005-3398.description: Display available HTTP options for each system

CVE-2005-3398.name: HTTP Cross-Site Tracing Detection
CVE-2005-3398.description: Checks if the host is vulnerable to Cross-Site Tracing (XST)

CVE-2005-3498.name: HTTP Options Detection
CVE-2005-3498.description: Display available HTTP options for each system

CVE-2005-4832.name: Oracle DB SQL Injection via SYS.DBMS_CDC_SUBSCRIBE.ACTIVATE_SUBSCRIPTION
CVE-2005-4832.description:
This module will escalate an Oracle DB user to DBA by exploiting a sql injection
          bug in the SYS.DBMS_CDC_SUBSCRIBE.ACTIVATE_SUBSCRIPTION package/function.
          This vulnerability affects to Oracle Database Server 9i up to 9.2.0.5 and
          10g up to 10.1.0.4.

CVE-2005-2799.name: Linksys WRT54 Access Point apply.cgi Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-2799.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in apply.cgi on the Linksys WRT54G and WRT54GS routers.
          According to iDefense who discovered this vulnerability, all WRT54G versions prior to
          4.20.7 and all WRT54GS version prior to 1.05.2 may be affected.

CVE-2005-2799.name: Linksys WRT54GL apply.cgi Command Execution
CVE-2005-2799.description:
Some Linksys Routers are vulnerable to an authenticated OS command injection in
          the Web Interface. Default credentials are admin/admin or admin/password. Since it
          is a blind os command injection vulnerability, there is no output for the executed
          command when using the cmd generic payload. A ping command against a controlled
          system could be used for testing purposes. The user must be prudent when using this
          module since it modifies the router configuration while exploitation, even when it
          tries to restore previous values.

CVE-2005-2799.name: Linksys WRT54G < 4.20.7 / WRT54GS < 1.05.2 - 'apply.cgi' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2799.description: Linksys WRT54G < 4.20.7 / WRT54GS < 1.05.2 - 'apply.cgi' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2799.name: Linksys WRT54 Access Point - 'apply.cgi' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2799.description: Linksys WRT54 Access Point - 'apply.cgi' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-3252.name: Snort Back Orifice Pre-Preprocessor Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-3252.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Back Orifice pre-processor module
          included with Snort versions 2.4.0, 2.4.1, 2.4.2, and 2.4.3. This vulnerability could
          be used to completely compromise a Snort sensor, and would typically gain an attacker
          full root or administrative privileges.

CVE-2005-3252.name: Snort 2.4.2 - Back Orifice Parsing Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-3252.description: Snort 2.4.2 - Back Orifice Parsing Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-1099.name: GLD (Greylisting Daemon) Postfix Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1099.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Salim Gasmi
          GLD <= 1.4 greylisting daemon for Postfix. By sending an
          overly long string the stack can be overwritten.

CVE-2005-1099.name: Salim Gasmi GLD (Greylisting Daemon) - Postfix Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1099.description: Salim Gasmi GLD (Greylisting Daemon) - Postfix Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1099.name: Salim Gasmi GLD (Greylisting Daemon) 1.0 < 1.4 - Postfix Greylisting Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1099.description: Salim Gasmi GLD (Greylisting Daemon) 1.0 < 1.4 - Postfix Greylisting Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1099.name: Salim Gasmi GLD (Greylisting Daemon) 1.x - Postfix Greylisting Daemon Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1099.description: Salim Gasmi GLD (Greylisting Daemon) 1.x - Postfix Greylisting Daemon Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-2265.name: Mozilla Suite/Firefox compareTo() Code Execution
CVE-2005-2265.description:
This module exploits a code execution vulnerability in the Mozilla
          Suite, Mozilla Firefox, and Mozilla Thunderbird applications. This exploit
          module is a direct port of Aviv Raff's HTML PoC.

CVE-2005-2852.name: Novell NetWare LSASS CIFS.NLM Driver Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-2852.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the NetWare CIFS.NLM driver.
          Since the driver runs in the kernel space, a failed exploit attempt can
          cause the OS to reboot.

CVE-2005-2852.name: Novell NetWare - LSASS CIFS.NLM Driver Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2852.description: Novell NetWare - LSASS CIFS.NLM Driver Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0491.name: Arkeia Backup Client Type 77 Overflow (Mac OS X)
CVE-2005-0491.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Arkeia backup
          client for the Mac OS X platform. This vulnerability affects
          all versions up to and including 5.3.3 and has been tested
          with Arkeia 5.3.1 on Mac OS X 10.3.5.

CVE-2005-0491.name: Arkeia Backup Client Type 77 Overflow (Win32)
CVE-2005-0491.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Arkeia backup
          client for the Windows platform. This vulnerability affects
          all versions up to and including 5.3.3.

CVE-2005-0491.name: Knox Arkeia Pro 5.1.12 - Backup Remote Code Execution
CVE-2005-0491.description: Knox Arkeia Pro 5.1.12 - Backup Remote Code Execution

CVE-2005-0491.name: Knox Arkeia Server Backup 5.3.x - Remote Code Execution
CVE-2005-0491.description: Knox Arkeia Server Backup 5.3.x - Remote Code Execution

CVE-2005-0491.name: Knox Arkeia Backup Client 5.3.3 Type 77 (OSX) - Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0491.description: Knox Arkeia Backup Client 5.3.3 Type 77 (OSX) - Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0491.name: Knox Arkeia Backup Client Type 77 (OSX) - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0491.description: Knox Arkeia Backup Client Type 77 (OSX) - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0491.name: Knox Arkeia Backup Client Type 77 (Windows x86) - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0491.description: Knox Arkeia Backup Client Type 77 (Windows x86) - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0116.name: AWStats configdir Remote Command Execution
CVE-2005-0116.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary command execution vulnerability in the
          AWStats CGI script. iDEFENSE has confirmed that AWStats versions 6.1 and 6.2
          are vulnerable.

CVE-2005-2847.name: Barracuda IMG.PL Remote Command Execution
CVE-2005-2847.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary command execution vulnerability in the
          Barracuda Spam Firewall appliance. Versions prior to 3.1.18 are vulnerable.

CVE-2005-10004.name: Cacti graph_view.php Remote Command Execution
CVE-2005-10004.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary command execution vulnerability in the
          Raxnet Cacti 'graph_view.php' script. All versions of Raxnet Cacti prior to
          0.8.6-d are vulnerable.

CVE-2005-3757.name: Google Appliance ProxyStyleSheet Command Execution
CVE-2005-3757.description:
This module exploits a feature in the Saxon XSLT parser used by
          the Google Search Appliance. This feature allows for arbitrary
          java methods to be called. Google released a patch and advisory to
          their client base in August of 2005 (GA-2005-08-m). The target appliance
          must be able to connect back to your machine for this exploit to work.

CVE-2005-3757.name: Google Search Appliance - proxystylesheet XSLT Java Code Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-3757.description: Google Search Appliance - proxystylesheet XSLT Java Code Execution (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2773.name: HP Openview connectedNodes.ovpl Remote Command Execution
CVE-2005-2773.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary command execution vulnerability in the
          HP OpenView connectedNodes.ovpl CGI application. The results of the command
          will be displayed to the screen.

CVE-2005-2773.name: HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'connectedNodes.ovp'l Remote Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2773.description: HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'connectedNodes.ovp'l Remote Command Execution (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2773.name: HP OpenView Network Node Manager 7.50 - Remote Command Execution
CVE-2005-2773.description: HP OpenView Network Node Manager 7.50 - Remote Command Execution

CVE-2005-0511.name: vBulletin misc.php Template Name Arbitrary Code Execution
CVE-2005-0511.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary PHP code execution flaw in
          the vBulletin web forum software. This vulnerability is only
          present when the "Add Template Name in HTML Comments" option
          is enabled. All versions of vBulletin prior to 3.0.7 are
          affected.

CVE-2005-0511.name: vBulletin - 'misc.php' Template Name Arbitrary Code Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0511.description: vBulletin - 'misc.php' Template Name Arbitrary Code Execution (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1921.name: PHP XML-RPC Arbitrary Code Execution
CVE-2005-1921.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary code execution flaw
          discovered in many implementations of the PHP XML-RPC module.
          This flaw is exploitable through a number of PHP web
          applications, including but not limited to Drupal, Wordpress,
          Postnuke, and TikiWiki.

CVE-2005-2086.name: phpBB viewtopic.php Arbitrary Code Execution
CVE-2005-2086.description:
This module exploits two arbitrary PHP code execution flaws in the
          phpBB forum system. The problem is that the 'highlight' parameter
          in the 'viewtopic.php' script is not verified properly and will
          allow an attacker to inject arbitrary code via preg_replace().

          This vulnerability was introduced in revision 3076, and finally
          fixed in revision 5166. According to the "tags" within their tree,
          this corresponds to versions 2.0.4 through 2.0.15 (inclusive).

CVE-2005-2733.name: Simple PHP Blog Remote Command Execution
CVE-2005-2733.description:
This module combines three separate issues within The Simple PHP Blog (<= 0.4.0)
          application to upload arbitrary data and thus execute a shell. The first
          vulnerability exposes the hash file (password.txt) to unauthenticated users.
          The second vulnerability lies within the image upload system provided to
          logged-in users; there is no image validation function in the blogger to
          prevent an authenticated user from uploading any file type. The third
          vulnerability occurs within the blog comment functionality, allowing
          arbitrary files to be deleted.

CVE-2005-2733.name: Simple PHP Blog 0.4.0 - Multiple Remote s
CVE-2005-2733.description: Simple PHP Blog 0.4.0 - Multiple Remote s

CVE-2005-2733.name: Simple PHP Blog 0.4.0 - Remote Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2733.description: Simple PHP Blog 0.4.0 - Remote Command Execution (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2877.name: TWiki History Function Arbitrary Command Execution
CVE-2005-2877.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the history component of TWiki.
          By passing a 'rev' parameter containing shell metacharacters,
          an attacker can execute arbitrary OS commands.

          Affected versions:
          - 20040902
          - 20040901
          - 20030201
          - 20011201
          - 20001201

CVE-2005-2877.name: TWiki TWikiUsers - INCLUDE Function Arbitrary Command Execution
CVE-2005-2877.description: TWiki TWikiUsers - INCLUDE Function Arbitrary Command Execution

CVE-2005-2612.name: WordPress cache_lastpostdate Arbitrary Code Execution
CVE-2005-2612.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary PHP code execution flaw in the WordPress
          blogging software. This vulnerability is only present when the PHP 'register_globals'
          option is enabled (common for hosting providers). All versions of WordPress prior to
          1.5.1.3 are affected.

CVE-2005-0773.name: Veritas Backup Exec Windows Remote Agent Overflow
CVE-2005-0773.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Veritas
          BackupExec Windows Agent software. This vulnerability occurs
          when a client authentication request is received with type
          '3' and a long password argument. Reliable execution is
          obtained by abusing the stack buffer overflow to smash a SEH
          pointer.

CVE-2005-0773.name: Veritas Backup Exec Windows - Remote Agent Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0773.description: Veritas Backup Exec Windows - Remote Agent Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2535.name: CA BrightStor Discovery Service TCP Overflow
CVE-2005-2535.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the CA BrightStor
          Discovery Service. This vulnerability occurs when a specific
          type of request is sent to the TCP listener on port 41523.
          This vulnerability was discovered by cybertronic[at]gmx.net
          and affects all known versions of the BrightStor product.
          This module is based on the 'cabrightstor_disco' exploit by
          HD Moore.

CVE-2005-2535.name: CA BrightStor ARCserve Backup - Remote Buffer Overflow (PoC)
CVE-2005-2535.description: CA BrightStor ARCserve Backup - Remote Buffer Overflow (PoC)

CVE-2005-2535.name: CA BrightStor Discovery Service - TCP Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2535.description: CA BrightStor Discovery Service - TCP Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0260.name: CA BrightStor Discovery Service Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0260.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the CA BrightStor
          Discovery Service. This vulnerability occurs when a large
          request is sent to UDP port 41524, triggering a stack buffer
          overflow.

CVE-2005-0260.name: CA BrightStor Discovery Service - Remote Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0260.description: CA BrightStor Discovery Service - Remote Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0581.name: CA BrightStor ARCserve License Service GCR NETWORK Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0581.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Computer Associates BrightStor ARCserve Backup 11.0.
          By sending a specially crafted request to the lic98rmtd.exe service, an attacker
          could overflow the buffer and execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2005-0581.name: Computer Associates License Client GETCONFIG Overflow
CVE-2005-0581.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the CA License Client
          service. This exploit will only work if your IP address can be
          resolved from the target system point of view. This can be
          accomplished on a local network by running the 'nmbd' service
          that comes with Samba. If you are running this exploit from
          Windows and do not filter udp port 137, this should not be a
          problem (if the target is on the same network segment). Due to
          the bugginess of the software, you are only allowed one connection
          to the agent port before it starts ignoring you. If it wasn't for this
          issue, it would be possible to repeatedly exploit this bug.

CVE-2005-0581.name: Computer Associates License Server GETCONFIG Overflow
CVE-2005-0581.description:
This module exploits an vulnerability in the CA License Server
          network service. By sending an excessively long GETCONFIG
          packet the stack may be overwritten.

CVE-2005-0581.name: CA BrightStor ARCserve License Service - 'GCR NETWORK' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0581.description: CA BrightStor ARCserve License Service - 'GCR NETWORK' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0581.name: CA License Server - 'GETCONFIG' Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0581.description: CA License Server - 'GETCONFIG' Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-0581.name: Computer Associates License Client - GETCONFIG Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0581.description: Computer Associates License Client - GETCONFIG Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0581.name: Computer Associates License Server - GETCONFIG Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0581.description: Computer Associates License Server - GETCONFIG Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1272.name: CA BrightStor Agent for Microsoft SQL Overflow
CVE-2005-1272.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the CA BrightStor
          Agent for Microsoft SQL Server. This vulnerability was
          discovered by cybertronic[at]gmx.net.

CVE-2005-1272.name: CA BrightStor Agent for Microsoft SQL - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1272.description: CA BrightStor Agent for Microsoft SQL - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1272.name: CA BrightStor ARCserve Backup Agent - 'dbasqlr.exe' Remote Overflow
CVE-2005-1272.description: CA BrightStor ARCserve Backup Agent - 'dbasqlr.exe' Remote Overflow

CVE-2005-1018.name: CA BrightStor Universal Agent Overflow
CVE-2005-1018.description:
This module exploits a convoluted heap overflow in the CA
          BrightStor Universal Agent service. Triple userland
          exception results in heap growth and execution of
          dereferenced function pointer at a specified address.

CVE-2005-1018.name: CA BrightStor Universal Agent - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1018.description: CA BrightStor Universal Agent - Remote Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0043.name: Apple ITunes 4.7 Playlist Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0043.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Apple ITunes 4.7
          build 4.7.0.42. By creating a URL link to a malicious PLS
          file, a remote attacker could overflow a buffer and execute
          arbitrary code. When using this module, be sure to set the
          URIPATH with an extension of '.pls'.

CVE-2005-0043.name: Apple iTunes - Playlist Parsing Local Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0043.description: Apple iTunes - Playlist Parsing Local Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-1790.name: MS05-054 Microsoft Internet Explorer JavaScript OnLoad Handler Remote Code Execution
CVE-2005-1790.description:
This bug is triggered when the browser handles a JavaScript 'onLoad' handler in
          conjunction with an improperly initialized 'window()' JavaScript function.
          This exploit results in a call to an address lower than the heap. The javascript
          prompt() places our shellcode near where the call operand points to.  We call
          prompt() multiple times in separate iframes to place our return address.
          We hide the prompts in a popup window behind the main window. We spray the heap
          a second time with our shellcode and point the return address to the heap. I use
          a fairly high address to make this exploit more reliable. IE will crash when the
          exploit completes.  Also, please note that Internet Explorer must allow popups
          in order to continue exploitation.

CVE-2005-1790.name: Microsoft Internet Explorer - JavaScript OnLoad Handler Remote Code Execution (MS05-054) (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1790.description: Microsoft Internet Explorer - JavaScript OnLoad Handler Remote Code Execution (MS05-054) (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-4560.name: Windows XP/2003/Vista Metafile Escape() SetAbortProc Code Execution
CVE-2005-4560.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the GDI library included with
          Windows XP and 2003. This vulnerability uses the 'Escape' metafile function
          to execute arbitrary code through the SetAbortProc procedure. This module
          generates a random WMF record stream for each request.

CVE-2005-4560.name: Microsoft Windows XP/Vista/2003 - Metafile Escape() SetAbortProc Code Execution (MS06-001) (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-4560.description: Microsoft Windows XP/Vista/2003 - Metafile Escape() SetAbortProc Code Execution (MS06-001) (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0455.name: RealNetworks RealPlayer SMIL Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0455.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in RealNetworks RealPlayer 10 and 8.
          By creating a URL link to a malicious SMIL file, a remote attacker could
          overflow a buffer and execute arbitrary code.
          When using this module, be sure to set the URIPATH with an extension of '.smil'.
          This module has been tested with RealPlayer 10 build 6.0.12.883 and RealPlayer 8
          build 6.0.9.584.

CVE-2005-0059.name: MS05-017 Microsoft Message Queueing Service Path Overflow
CVE-2005-0059.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the RPC interface
          to the Microsoft Message Queueing service. The offset to the
          return address changes based on the length of the system
          hostname, so this must be provided via the 'HNAME' option.
          Much thanks to snort.org and Jean-Baptiste Marchand's
          excellent MSRPC website.

CVE-2005-0059.name: Microsoft Message Queueing Service - Path Overflow (MS05-017) (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0059.description: Microsoft Message Queueing Service - Path Overflow (MS05-017) (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0059.name: Microsoft Windows Message Queuing - Remote Buffer Overflow Universal (MS05-017) (v.0.3)
CVE-2005-0059.description: Microsoft Windows Message Queuing - Remote Buffer Overflow Universal (MS05-017) (v.0.3)

CVE-2005-0308.name: URSoft W32Dasm Disassembler Function Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0308.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in W32Dasm <= v8.93.
          By creating a malicious file and convincing a user to disassemble
          the file with a vulnerable version of W32Dasm, the Imports/Exports
          function is copied to the stack and arbitrary code may be executed
          locally as the user.

CVE-2005-0308.name: URSoft W32Dasm 8.93 - Disassembler Function Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-0308.description: URSoft W32Dasm 8.93 - Disassembler Function Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0277.name: 3Com 3CDaemon 2.0 FTP Username Overflow
CVE-2005-0277.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the 3Com 3CDaemon
          FTP service. This package is being distributed from the 3Com
          web site and is recommended in numerous support documents.
          This module uses the USER command to trigger the overflow.

CVE-2005-3683.name: freeFTPd 1.0 Username Overflow
CVE-2005-3683.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the freeFTPd
          multi-protocol file transfer service. This flaw can only be
          exploited when logging has been enabled (non-default).

CVE-2005-1415.name: GlobalSCAPE Secure FTP Server Input Overflow
CVE-2005-1415.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the GlobalSCAPE Secure FTP Server.
          All versions prior to 3.0.3 are affected by this flaw. A valid user account (
          or anonymous access) is required for this exploit to work.

CVE-2005-1415.name: GlobalScape Secure FTP Server - Input Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1415.description: GlobalScape Secure FTP Server - Input Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1415.name: GlobalScape Secure FTP Server 3.0 - Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1415.description: GlobalScape Secure FTP Server 3.0 - Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-1323.name: NetTerm NetFTPD USER Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1323.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the NetTerm NetFTPD
          application. This package is part of the NetTerm package.
          This module uses the USER command to trigger the overflow.

CVE-2005-1323.name: NetFTPd 4.2.2 - User Authentication Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1323.description: NetFTPd 4.2.2 - User Authentication Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-2373.name: SlimFTPd LIST Concatenation Overflow
CVE-2005-2373.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the SlimFTPd
          server. The flaw is triggered when a LIST command is
          received with an overly-long argument. This vulnerability
          affects all versions of SlimFTPd prior to 3.16 and was
          discovered by Raphael Rigo.

CVE-2005-0595.name: BadBlue 2.5 EXT.dll Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0595.description: This is a stack buffer overflow exploit for BadBlue version 2.5.

CVE-2005-0595.name: BadBlue 2.5 - Easy File Sharing Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0595.description: BadBlue 2.5 - Easy File Sharing Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-3190.name: CA iTechnology iGateway Debug Mode Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-3190.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the Computer Associates
          iTechnology iGateway component. When <Debug>True</Debug> is enabled
          in igateway.conf (non-default), it is possible to overwrite the stack
          and execute code remotely. This module works best with Ordinal payloads.

CVE-2005-3190.name: CA iTechnology iGateway - 'Debug Mode' Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-3190.description: CA iTechnology iGateway - 'Debug Mode' Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-3190.name: CA iTechnology iGateway - Debug Mode Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-3190.description: CA iTechnology iGateway - Debug Mode Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2551.name: eDirectory 8.7.3 iMonitor Remote Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-2551.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in eDirectory 8.7.3
          iMonitor service. This vulnerability was discovered by Peter
          Winter-Smith of NGSSoftware.

          NOTE: repeated exploitation attempts may cause eDirectory to crash. It does
          not restart automatically in a default installation.

CVE-2005-2551.name: eDirectory 8.7.3 - iMonitor Remote Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2551.description: eDirectory 8.7.3 - iMonitor Remote Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1348.name: MailEnable Authorization Header Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1348.description:
This module exploits a remote buffer overflow in the MailEnable web service.
          The vulnerability is triggered when a large value is placed into the Authorization
          header of the web request. MailEnable Enterprise Edition versions prior to 1.0.5 and
          MailEnable Professional versions prior to 1.55 are affected.

CVE-2005-1348.name: MailEnable Enterprise & Professional - https Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1348.description: MailEnable Enterprise & Professional - https Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-0684.name: MaxDB WebDBM GET Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0684.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the MaxDB WebDBM
          service. This service is included with many recent versions
          of the MaxDB and SAPDB products. This particular module is
          capable of exploiting Windows systems through the use of an
          SEH frame overwrite. The offset to the SEH frame may change
          depending on where MaxDB has been installed, this module
          assumes a web root path with the same length as:

          C:\Program Files\sdb\programs\web\Documents

CVE-2005-2297.name: Sybase EAServer 5.2 Remote Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-2297.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Sybase EAServer Web
          Console. The offset to the SEH frame appears to change depending
          on what version of Java is in use by the remote server, making this
          exploit somewhat unreliable.

CVE-2005-2297.name: Sybase EAServer 5.2 - Remote Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2297.description: Sybase EAServer 5.2 - Remote Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0478.name: TrackerCam PHP Argument Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0478.description:
This module exploits a simple stack buffer overflow in the
          TrackerCam web server. All current versions of this software
          are vulnerable to a large number of security issues. This
          module abuses the directory traversal flaw to gain
          information about the system and then uses the PHP overflow
          to execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2005-4267.name: Qualcomm WorldMail 3.0 IMAPD LIST Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-4267.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Qualcomm WorldMail IMAP Server
          version 3.0 (builds 6.1.19.0 through 6.1.22.0). Version 6.1.22.1 fixes this
          particular vulnerability.

          NOTE: The service does NOT restart automatically by default. You may be limited to
          only one attempt, so choose wisely!

CVE-2005-4267.name: Eudora Qualcomm WorldMail 3.0 - IMAPd 'LIST' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-4267.description: Eudora Qualcomm WorldMail 3.0 - IMAPd 'LIST' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-2278.name: MailEnable IMAPD (1.54) STATUS Request Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-2278.description:
MailEnable's IMAP server contains a buffer overflow
          vulnerability in the STATUS command. With proper
          credentials, this could allow for the execution of arbitrary
          code.

CVE-2005-2278.name: MailEnable IMAPD 1.54 - STATUS Request Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-2278.description: MailEnable IMAPD 1.54 - STATUS Request Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-3155.name: MailEnable IMAPD W3C Logging Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-3155.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the W3C logging
          functionality of the MailEnable IMAPD service. Logging is
          not enabled by default and this exploit requires a valid
          username and password to exploit the flaw. MailEnable
          Professional version 1.6 and prior and MailEnable Enterprise
          version 1.1 and prior are affected.

CVE-2005-3155.name: MailEnable - IMAPD W3C Logging Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-3155.description: MailEnable - IMAPD W3C Logging Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-3155.description: MailEnable 1.54 Pro - Universal IMAPD W3C Logging Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1758.name: Novell NetMail IMAP AUTHENTICATE Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-1758.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Novell's NetMail 3.52 IMAP AUTHENTICATE
          GSSAPI command. By sending an overly long string, an attacker can overwrite the
          buffer and control program execution. Using the PAYLOAD of windows/shell_bind_tcp
          or windows/shell_reverse_tcp allows for the most reliable results.

CVE-2005-3314.name: Novell NetMail IMAP STATUS Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-3314.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Novell's NetMail 3.52 IMAP STATUS
          verb. By sending an overly long string, an attacker can overwrite the
          buffer and control program execution.

CVE-2005-3314.name: Novell NetMail 3.52d - IMAP STATUS Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-3314.description: Novell NetMail 3.52d - IMAP STATUS Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-4734.name: Microsoft IIS ISAPI RSA WebAgent Redirect Overflow
CVE-2005-4734.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the SecurID Web
          Agent for IIS. This ISAPI filter runs in-process with
          inetinfo.exe, any attempt to exploit this flaw will result
          in the termination and potential restart of the IIS service.

CVE-2005-4734.name: Microsoft IIS - ISAPI RSA WebAgent Redirect Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-4734.description: Microsoft IIS - ISAPI RSA WebAgent Redirect Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-0353.name: SentinelLM UDP Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-0353.description:
This module exploits a simple stack buffer overflow in the Sentinel
          License Manager. The SentinelLM service is installed with a
          wide selection of products and seems particular popular with
          academic products. If the wrong target value is selected,
          the service will crash and not restart.

CVE-2005-0353.description: Sentinel LM 7.x - UDP License Service Remote Buffer Overflow

CVE-2005-1815.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Hummingbird Connectivity
          10 LPD Daemon. This module has only been tested against Hummingbird
          Exceed v10 with SP5.

CVE-2005-1815.name: Hummingbird Connectivity 10 SP5 - LPD Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-1815.description: Hummingbird Connectivity 10 SP5 - LPD Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1009.description:
This module exploits a heap overflow in the BakBone NetVault
          Process Manager service. This code is a direct port of the netvault.c
          code written by nolimit and BuzzDee.

CVE-2005-4411.name: Mercury/32 PH Server Module Buffer Overflow
CVE-2005-4411.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in
          Mercury/32 <= v4.01b PH Server Module. This issue is
          due to a failure of the application to properly bounds check
          user-supplied data prior to copying it to a fixed size memory buffer.

CVE-2005-4145.name: Lyris ListManager MSDE Weak sa Password
CVE-2005-4145.description:
This module exploits a weak password vulnerability in the
          Lyris ListManager MSDE install. During installation, the 'sa'
          account password is set to 'lminstall'. Once the install
          completes, it is set to 'lyris' followed by the process
          ID of the installer. This module brute forces all possible
          process IDs that would be used by the installer.

CVE-2005-4145.name: Lyris ListManager - MSDE Weak sa Password (Metasploit)
CVE-2005-4145.description: Lyris ListManager - MSDE Weak sa Password (Metasploit)

CVE-2005-1812.name: FutureSoft TFTP Server 2000 Transfer-Mode Overflow
CVE-2005-1812.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the FutureSoft TFTP Server
          2000 product. By sending an overly long transfer-mode string, we were able
          to overwrite both the SEH and the saved EIP. A subsequent write-exception
          that will occur allows the transferring of execution to our shellcode
          via the overwritten SEH. This module has been tested against Windows
          2000 Professional and for some reason does not seem to work against
